_meta.purpose: Fed MPR HTML sources for scraping. Semiannual reports use a stable URL pattern; each edition lists explicit section files.
_meta.maintenance: For a new report: (1) Open the catalog page and the edition's branch page. (2) Copy each HTML link (skip *-accessible.htm duplicates unless you need them). (3) Add a new object under releases with edition matching the filename prefix (e.g. 2025-12). (4) Set scrape false on old editions if you only want the latest in the index. By default we omit Data Notes and Abbreviations (low narrative value for Q&A); add them only if you need glossary or methodology text.
